title: 8 Signs a Godly Man Isn't Actually Running His Life
caption:
You'd like to think you're the one driving. Most days, something else has the wheel.

The 2 a.m. scroll you never decided to start. The reply you sent before you cooled down. The order you doubled without noticing you were bored. None of it was a decision. It was an impulse wearing your name.

"Whoever is slow to anger is better than the mighty, and he who rules his spirit than he who takes a city." — Proverbs 16:32

Save this. Check which ones are actually running you.

#faith #selfcontrol #christianmen #discipline #godlymen #manofgod #proverbs #scripture #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
